1.name: Beginner
1.description: Common fallacies you encounter every day. Easy to spot once you know them.

2.name: Intermediate
2.description: More subtle fallacies that require careful thinking to identify.

3.name: Advanced
3.description: Complex fallacies often used in professional and academic debates.

4.name: Expert
4.description: Sophisticated rhetorical techniques that are very difficult to detect.
